decisions.decision: Use existing Sphinx/RST docstring style to match the check method and other files in the inference module (contracts.py, config.py).
Add docstrings to __init__, cache_hits property, and cache_misses property. Enhance check with :param/:returns: sections. Leave reset as-is (already documented).
alternatives_rejected: Only add docstrings where none exist without enhancing existing ones

decisions.decision: Do not add usage examples in docstrings. Tests already serve as living documentation and the API is small.
alternatives_rejected: Add doctest-style examples to check method

decisions.decision: Do not add docstrings to InvalidationResult fields. It is a frozen dataclass with self-documenting field names and already has a class docstring.
alternatives_rejected: Add Attributes section documenting each dataclass field

steps.task: Add a one-line docstring to __init__ describing initialization of internal hash store and counters.
Add :param: and :returns: sections to the existing check method docstring using RST style.
Add one-line docstrings to cache_hits and cache_misses properties.
Run existing tests (pytest backend/inference/test_* or similar) to confirm no regressions.
